home_complete_birth_details:
Complete your birth details
to unlock your daily horoscope
daily_text_0: Your natal chart is a map of the sky at the exact moment you took your first breath. It holds every answer you seek.
daily_text_1: The planets that watched over your birth are still speaking. Your chart is the language they left you.
daily_text_2: You were born at the perfect cosmic moment. Every placement in your chart was chosen by the universe for you.
daily_text_3: Your rising sign shapes how the world sees you. Your moon sign reveals what your soul craves in the dark.
daily_text_4: The stars did not place you here by accident. Your natal chart is proof of your divine design.
daily_text_5: Sun, Moon, and Rising — your cosmic trinity — together they paint the full portrait of who you are.
daily_text_6: You are a living astrology. Every breath carries the energy of the sky on the day you were born.
daily_text_7: Your chart does not define your fate. It reveals your gifts so you can choose your destiny freely.
daily_text_8: The universe encrypted your purpose in the positions of ten celestial bodies the moment you arrived.
daily_text_9: Your north node points to where you are going. Trust the direction the cosmos has always intended for you.
daily_text_10: Every planet in your chart is a teacher. Some lessons are gentle, some are fierce — all are sacred.
daily_text_11: You are not lost. You are exactly at the coordinate the stars marked out for this chapter of your story.
daily_text_12: Your Venus sign knows what your heart truly longs for, long before your mind finds the words.
daily_text_13: Your Mars placement is the fire inside you — the drive that no one else on Earth has in quite the same way.
daily_text_14: The universe does not make mistakes. Your birth chart is its most personal letter, written for you alone.
daily_text_15: Your 12th house holds the wisdom of past lives. The universe never wastes a single experience.
daily_text_16: When you feel lost, look up. The same sky that presided over your birth is still holding space for you.
daily_text_17: Your natal Mercury shows how your mind was built to receive truth. Trust your unique way of knowing.
daily_text_18: Every challenge in your chart is a doorway, not a wall. You were given exactly the lessons you can handle.
daily_text_19: Your Jupiter sign marks where abundance flows most naturally for you. Lean into that energy today.
daily_text_20: The cosmos put a specific kind of magic in your hands when you were born. Your chart is the instruction manual.
daily_text_21: You carry stardust from planets billions of miles away. There is nothing ordinary about your existence.
daily_text_22: Your Ascendant is the mask that becomes the face. In time, the role you play becomes who you truly are.
daily_text_23: The sky at your birth was a unique configuration that will never exist again. You are genuinely one of a kind.
daily_text_24: Your Saturn placement shows where your soul agreed to do the deepest work. Honor that sacred contract.
daily_text_25: In the silence between the stars, the universe composed a song. Your natal chart is the sheet music.
daily_text_26: The moon was in a particular sign when you arrived. That sign still rules the tides of your emotional world.
daily_text_27: Your south node shows where you came from. Your north node points to who you are becoming. Walk forward.
daily_text_28: You are the universe experiencing itself through this body, in this lifetime, with this chart. That is enough.
daily_text_29: Every transit is a conversation between the sky and your birth chart. The stars are always speaking to you.
explore_natal_chart_desc: Your horoscope for today is being prepared
explore_compatibility_desc: Discover your cosmic connection with others
explore_breathwork_desc: Balance your energy with guided breathing
explore_moon_rituals_desc: Align your intentions with the lunar cycle
explore_astrocartography_desc: Discover where your cosmic power lines flow across the world
natal_birth_map_desc: Your complete astrological blueprint — personality, purpose, love, career & a 3-year cosmic forecast.
natal_birth_map_sheet_subtitle: A one-time purchase — your Birth Map is yours forever.
natal_birth_map_bullet_2: Soul purpose, karmic lessons & north node path
natal_birth_map_bullet_5: Export as PDF or Instagram Story
natal_complete_details: Tap here to complete your birth details and unlock your natal chart.
compat_no_partners_sub: Add someone to discover your cosmic compatibility.
moon_ritual_new_moon_desc: The New Moon opens a portal of infinite possibility. Sit in stillness, light a candle, and write your deepest desires on paper. The cosmos is ready to receive your call.
moon_ritual_waxing_crescent_desc: Your seeds are planted. Take inspired action and tend to your intentions daily. Every small, aligned step moves you closer to the life you are calling in.
moon_ritual_first_quarter_desc: The First Quarter brings challenges that test your commitment. This friction is your teacher. Recommit to your vision and take one bold, decisive action today.
moon_ritual_waxing_gibbous_desc: You are almost there. Review your progress, release what is not working, and fine-tune your approach. Patience now is the most powerful force in your arsenal.
moon_ritual_full_moon_desc: Under the Full Moon's radiant light, all is revealed. Write what you are ready to release and burn or bury the paper. Celebrate how far you have come — you are the cosmos.
moon_ritual_waning_gibbous_desc: Having received the full light of manifestation, it is time to give. Share your gifts, teach what you know, and extend gratitude for the abundance flowing through your life.
moon_ritual_last_quarter_desc: The Last Quarter calls for sacred release. Forgive yourself and others without condition. Let go of the stories, patterns, and beliefs that dim your light.
moon_ritual_waning_crescent_desc: You have done the deep work. Now rest, dream vividly, and allow the universe to prepare the next cycle. Trust the sacred timing of all things unfolding for you.
astro_summary_para1: At the exact moment you were born, every planet occupied a precise angle in the sky — rising on the eastern horizon, setting in the west, culminating at its peak, or resting at its lowest. Projected onto a world map, these positions become lines of planetary influence crossing every continent.
astro_summary_para2: Every city you visit and every country you call home sits under the pull of different planetary lines — some amplifying your gifts, some calling you toward growth, and some offering the quiet of deep belonging.
astro_summary_para3_city: Born in {city}, you carry the cosmic signature of that exact sky wherever you travel.
astro_summary_para3_no_city: Your birth location carries a unique cosmic signature that follows you wherever you travel.
astro_summary_unlock: Unlock your full report to see all 8 planetary lines, world map, and personalised destination insights.
astro_planetary_lines_sub: 8 lines calculated from your birth moment
astro_planet_by_planet_sub: Tap each planet to read your detailed line interpretation
astro_power_regions_sub: Your planetary lines across the globe
astro_destiny_compass_sub: Your three most powerful global directions
astro_include_1: Detailed reading for all 8 planetary lines
astro_include_2: Astrocartography world map with your power lines
astro_include_5: Best regions for love, career & healing
astro_line_sun_reading: Where your Sun line rises, you are fully seen. Your authentic self shines without effort and people recognise your gifts immediately. Opportunities to lead appear naturally, and a lasting visible legacy becomes possible. Long-term residence here accelerates career recognition and personal authority.
astro_line_moon_reading: Your Moon line marks territory that feels like home — even on a first visit. Emotional bonds form deeply and quickly here. The landscape nourishes your inner world and heals old wounds. Ideal for settling down, raising a family, or retreating for profound personal renewal.
astro_line_venus_reading: Venus magnetises love and beauty wherever her line falls. Relationships formed in these regions carry rare depth and pleasure. Creativity flows effortlessly, and the environments themselves tend toward elegance. Romantic and professional partnerships formed here are unusually harmonious and long-lasting.
astro_line_mars_reading: Mars ignites. Physical energy is amplified here, and competitive environments feel invigorating rather than draining. Entrepreneurship, athletics, and bold ventures flourish. Beware: conflicts can intensify, so channel the fire consciously into purposeful action.
astro_line_jupiter_reading: Jupiter's line is universally beloved. Fortune flows naturally — doors open, opportunities multiply, and optimism becomes contagious. Higher education, philosophy, travel, and financial growth are all amplified. A wonderful destination for both short visits and extended stays.
astro_line_saturn_reading: Saturn demands dedication — but the rewards are unmatched in permanence. Work done along this line is of the highest quality and creates a legacy that outlasts you. Not a place for shortcuts; a place for forging character and building something that will endure across generations.
astro_line_uranus_reading: Uranus breaks patterns and invites radical change — the best kind. Unexpected breakthroughs arrive suddenly along this line. Original thinking is valued, and futuristic or tech-forward environments feel natural. Ideal for those ready to reinvent themselves or disrupt an entire field.
astro_line_neptune_reading: Neptune dissolves the boundary between self and cosmos. Creativity flows like water, intuition becomes prophetic, and spiritual experiences arise spontaneously. Art created here resonates far beyond the local audience. Ideal for healers, mystics, artists, and deep-sea dreamers.
astro_dest_career_why: Your Sun and Saturn lines converge here, creating an environment where your work is recognised and your legacy is built to last.
astro_dest_love_why: Venus and Neptune lines cross this region, heightening beauty, romantic connection, and artistic inspiration.
astro_dest_home_why: Your Moon line rests here. Emotional safety, belonging, and deep restoration are the gifts of these lands.
horoscope_empty: Complete your birth details to unlock your daily horoscope

bm_not_found_sub: Your cosmic blueprint hasn't been generated yet.

compat_deep_report_sub: Get a full AI-powered analysis of your cosmic connection — emotional alignment, karmic bonds, communication patterns, and more.
compat_pro_sub:
Upgrade to unlock your full
deep compatibility report
compat_desc_kindred: Kindred Spirits — you share the same elemental energy, creating a natural and effortless flow between you.
compat_desc_complements: Cosmic Complements — your elements balance each other beautifully, sparking growth and mutual understanding.
compat_desc_tension: Interesting Tension — different rhythms can create both friction and fascination. The universe is nudging you both to expand.
compat_desc_challenge: Sacred Challenge — opposing elements, but every great story needs contrast. This connection calls for patience and deep curiosity.
